title: Warm German Pretzel Wrap
description: Buttery, cheese‑pull German wrap made with low‑carb pretzel dough and sugar‑free chocolate for a cozy, diabetic‑friendly treat.
instructions: Spread the melted butter evenly over the pretzel dough sheet.
Sprinkle the shredded cheddar cheese over the buttered dough.
Add a layer of sugar‑free chocolate chips across the dough.
Season with sea salt and chopped chives.
Fold the dough into a rectangular wrap and seal the edges by pressing them together.
Place the wrap seam‑side down on a parchment‑lined baking sheet.
Bake for 12 minutes until the cheese melts and the edges are golden.
Remove from the oven and let the wrap cool for 2 minutes.
Slice the warm wrap into bite‑size pieces and serve immediately.
